claims.check: current shipped skill equals source payload, template JSON parses, and every lint rule named in SKILL.md resolves in the shipped lint rule registry
claims.replay_command: git diff --quiet 0ec0efff HEAD -- skills/pumped-fn && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('skills/pumped-fn/templates/workspace/package.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('skills/pumped-fn/templates/workspace/tsconfig.json','utf8'))" && missing=0; for rule in $(rg -o 'no-[a-z][a-z-]+' skills/pumped-fn/SKILL.md | sort -u); do rg -qF "pumped/$rule" pkg/tool/lint/README.md || missing=1; done; test "$missing" -eq 0
claims.source_command: git diff --quiet 0ec0efff HEAD -- skills/pumped-fn && node JSON parse of workspace package and tsconfig; for each no-* token in SKILL.md require pumped/<rule> in pkg/tool/lint/README.md

claims.check: repository-owned example alignment checker reports every public inventory, package, pattern, script, reference, and usage drift metric at zero
claims.threshold: checker_exit == 0 and ok == true and every gap_or_mismatch_or_drift_count == 0

claims.check: sdk-mcp public code typechecks and focused tests covering documented tool metadata, config, validation, raw input, output, error, transport, and cleanup contracts pass
claims.replay_command: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-mcp typecheck && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-mcp exec vitest run tests/mcp.test.ts
claims.source_command: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-mcp typecheck && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-mcp exec vitest run tests/mcp.test.ts
claims.threshold: typecheck_exit == 0 and test_file_pass_count == 1 and test_pass_count == 8 and test_fail_count == 0

claims.check: Claude and Codex public code typecheck and focused tests covering documented aliases, provider switching, explicit config, roots, permissions, empty MCP, cancellation, graph edges, scope seam, bounded cleanup, and typed shutdown failure pass
claims.replay_command: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-claude typecheck && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-claude exec vitest run tests/claude.test.ts && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-codex typecheck && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-codex exec vitest run tests/codex.test.ts tests/codex.acp.test.ts
claims.source_command: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-claude typecheck && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-claude exec vitest run tests/claude.test.ts && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-codex typecheck && pnpm -F @pumped-fn/sdk-codex exec vitest run tests/codex.test.ts tests/codex.acp.test.ts
claims.threshold: both_typecheck_exits == 0 and test_file_pass_count == 3 and test_pass_count == 26 and test_fail_count == 0

claims.check: scoped lint accepts all integrated SDK public source/docs/skill surfaces with zero diagnostics and static search finds explicit controller, boundary, required-tag, and scope-preset seams
claims.fail_closed_reason: raw setTimeout is an uncontrolled ambient effect inside mcpServer resource cleanup
claims.replay_command: node pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs --max-warnings 0 pkg/sdk/mcp/src pkg/sdk/claude/src pkg/sdk/codex/src pkg/sdk/mcp/README.md pkg/sdk/claude/README.md pkg/sdk/codex/README.md skills/pumped-fn && rg -q 'deps: \{ (run|prompt): controller\(|deps: \{ config: tags\.required|ownership: "boundary"' pkg/sdk/mcp/src/index.ts pkg/sdk/claude/src/index.ts pkg/sdk/codex/src/index.ts
claims.source_command: node pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs --max-warnings 0 pkg/sdk/mcp/src pkg/sdk/claude/src pkg/sdk/codex/src pkg/sdk/mcp/README.md pkg/sdk/claude/README.md pkg/sdk/codex/README.md skills/pumped-fn; rg explicit graph and seam patterns in SDK source/tests

unknowns.issue: whether documentation prose should require cleanup in every shortened snippet
